message:
debug(lab): add diagnostic prints and fix RNG bit selection in LabRuntime

Add temporary diagnostic println! statements in step() and schedule()
to trace task execution order and RNG values during the first 50 steps,
aiding debugging of non-deterministic scheduling issues.

Fix worker_hint computation to use high bits of xorshift64 output
(rng_value >> 32) instead of low bits, which have poor entropy in
xorshift generators and could bias worker selection.

Suppress unused-variable warnings for old_time in inject_clock_skew
and error in turn_with by prefixing with underscore.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
